title: Women's Motivation: Unlock Your Potential
description: Empowering women to overcome self-doubt, set boundaries, and achieve their goals 💪 #womensmotivation #selfempowerment #inspiration

slides.topSection: 2-4 icons of negative self-talk, red X center, caption 'self-doubt holds you back'
slides.bottomSection: 2-4 icons of positive affirmation, green check center, caption 'believe in yourself'

slides.topSection: 2-4 icons representing burnout, red X center, caption 'exhausted from juggling'
slides.bottomSection: 2-4 icons representing balance, green check center, caption 'prioritize what matters'

slides.topSection: 2-4 icons of people overstepping, red X center, caption 'people pleasing harms you'
slides.bottomSection: 2-4 icons of personal space, green check center, caption 'say no to protect yourself'

slides.topSection: 2-4 icons of financial stress, red X center, caption 'money worries limit you'
slides.bottomSection: 2-4 icons of financial planning, green check center, caption 'build your wealth'

slides.topSection: 2-4 icons of neglect, red X center, caption 'neglecting yourself backfires'
slides.bottomSection: 2-4 icons of self-care, green check center, caption 'nurture yourself daily'

slides.topSection: 2-4 icons of limiting beliefs, red X center, caption 'don't settle for less'
slides.bottomSection: 2-4 icons of growth, green check center, caption 'you are limitless'
